name: Laffitte (Reprint)
effect_text: [Activate: Main] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards and this Character: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Blackbeard Pirates" type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
